headline: The first Story-Rich showcase was packed with narrative-driven games
summary: Fellow Traveller hosted its first Story-Rich Showcase. Over 20 narrative-driven indie games were featured. Notable announcements from the event were highlighted.

headline: GOG apologizes for emailing people Nazi symbols
summary: GOG sent a newsletter containing Nazi SS symbols. The company attributed the error to a 'series of mistakes'. This included miscommunication, font rendering issues, and understaffing.

headline: The cutest games from the Wholesome Direct 2026 showcase
summary: Wholesome Direct 2026 showcased over 50 'cute' and 'chill' indie games. It offered a change of pace from blockbuster showcases. The article highlights some of the best titles from the event.

headline: Summer Game Fest 2026: All the news from gaming’s busiest week
summary: June marks the start of major gaming events like Summer Game Fest. PlayStation kicked off with a focus on premium single-player titles. Xbox and Geoff Keighley also hosted major announcements.

headline: Tatiana Maslany Explains Coen Brothers Influence on Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed | IGN Live 2026
summary: Tatiana Maslany discussed her show 'Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed' at IGN Live. She highlighted the Coen Brothers' influence on the series. A new clip from the Apple TV+ show was also debuted.

headline: Death Stranding Director Gives Update on Movie and New Character Plans | IGN Live 2026
summary: The director of Death Stranding provided updates on the upcoming movie. Details were also shared regarding new character plans. This was announced during IGN Live 2026.

headline: Fast & Furious' Sung Kang Debuts Trailer for Drifter, His Directorial Debut | IGN Live 2026
summary: Sung Kang from 'Fast & Furious' debuted a trailer for 'Drifter'. 'Drifter' marks Kang's directorial debut. The trailer was revealed at IGN Live.

headline: Star Trek: Shadow Frontier Game Reveal Trailer Explores Trek's Darker Side | IGN Live 2026
summary: A reveal trailer for 'Star Trek: Shadow Frontier' was shown. The new game promises to explore a darker side of the Trek universe. The trailer premiered at IGN Live 2026.

headline: Delays to defence plan undermine UK credibility, MPs say
summary: MPs state that delays to the Defence Investment Plan harm UK credibility. The plan is now expected before an early July Nato summit. Concerns are raised about the UK's defense posture.

headline: Starmer tells supporters he will fight any leadership contest
summary: Keir Starmer affirmed he would fight any Labour leadership contest. His stance hardened after Andy Burnham expressed interest. This suggests potential internal party challenges.

headline: Cosmeticorexia: How girls are falling down a skincare rabbit hole
summary: 'Cosmeticorexia' describes girls' excessive interest in skincare. Social media is fueling a booming market for children's skincare. Experts fear long-term negative impacts on young girls.

headline: Police officer turned Love Island US contestant faces hometown backlash
summary: Sean Reifel, a police officer, joined Love Island US. He is facing backlash from his hometown community. He joined the police force less than a year ago.
